issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Home advisors continued to receive post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper exit filters for these deal stages. Madelaine tweaked the workflow filters on March 9 to address this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any outstanding check-in tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger to collect closing info. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger on March 16.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO's information instead of the new one. The issue was reported for a specific deal where Paul was shown instead of Julie Yocum. Luis resolved the issue on March 13.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend any automated agent-facing emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC Offer Accepted deals not enrolling TCs into workflow or generating tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or task creation. HubSpot support was contacted and identified the underlying issue. The fix was confirmed on April 1 after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 into the TC workflow, and send closing info collection emails manually.
